nasb.text: He has rejected your calf, O Samaria, saying, “My anger burns against them!” How long will they be incapable of innocence?

esv.text: I have spurned your calf, O Samaria. My anger burns against them. How long will they be incapable of innocence?

cnv.text: 撒瑪利亞啊！我要除掉你的牛犢， 我的怒氣要向撒瑪利亞人發作， 他們要到幾時才能無罪免罰呢？

ccb.text: 我鄙弃撒玛利亚人所拜的牛犊， 我要向他们发怒， 他们到什么时候才能洁身自守呢？
